title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 77.360 - May remit fines
text:
77.360.  May remit fines. — The mayor shall have power to remit fines and forfeitures and to grant reprieves and pardons for offenses arising under ordinances of the city; but this section shall not be so construed as to authorize the mayor to remit any costs which may have accrued to any officer of the city by reason of any prosecution under the laws or ordinances of said city.
(RSMo 1939 § 6877) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 6731; 1919 § 8218; 1909 § 9155
